title: Support Worker
description:
Creative Support is looking for a motivated Support Worker to join our team in Sheffield.

Creative Support is looking for a motivated Support Worker to join our team in Sheffield. Our service supports individuals with a range of needs. As a Support Worker you will provide person-centred care and support, assisting with daily living tasks and promoting independence and wellbeing. You will work closely with service users to ensure high-quality support. Previous experience in a care setting is desirable. Benefits of working with Creative Support include training opportunities and career progression.

title: Care Assistant
description:
As a Care Assistant, you will provide essential support to residents.

As a Care Assistant, you will provide essential support to residents. You will assist with personal care, support mobility and nutrition, and maintain dignity and respect at all times. You will be part of a care team ensuring residents receive high-quality support. Benefits include paid training and flexible shifts.

title: Healthcare Assistant
description:
Healthcare Assistant role supporting clinical teams.

Healthcare Assistant role supporting clinical teams. Responsibilities include monitoring patient wellbeing, assisting nurses with care delivery, and maintaining hygiene standards. This role offers NHS experience and flexible working patterns.

title: Support Worker - Nights
description:
Night Support Worker role providing overnight care.

Night Support Worker role providing overnight care. You will support residents during night shifts, monitor safety and wellbeing, and respond to needs promptly. Benefits include night shift enhancements and training provided.

title: Residential Support Worker
description:
Residential Support Worker role supporting vulnerable individuals.

Residential Support Worker role supporting vulnerable individuals. Duties include providing emotional and practical support, working within care plans, and maintaining safeguarding standards. Competitive hourly rate and ongoing support provided.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker role helping people live independently.

Support Worker role helping people live independently. Responsibilities include encouraging independence, assisting with daily routines, and supporting community engagement. Inclusive workplace with development opportunities.

title: Care Assistant
description:
Care Assistant role delivering high-quality home care.

Care Assistant role delivering high-quality home care. You will provide personal care, support medication routines, and build relationships with clients. Benefits include mileage paid and flexible working.
